=== bd_New York City_20040607.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan & Wynton Marsalis Septet

Apollo Theater
New York City, New York
7 June 2004
 
 
Jazz at Lincoln Center's 2004 Spring Gala
 

1. Introduction
2. It Takes A Lot To Laugh, It Takes A Train To Cry
3. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
 



Bob Dylan (vocal, guitar & harmonica) 

backed by Wynton Marsalis Septet: 
Wynton Marsalis (trumpet), 
Ronald Westray (trombone), 
Victor Goines (tenor saxophone), 
Wess Anderson (alto saxophone), 
Aaron Diehl (piano), 
Reginald Veal (bass), 
Herlin Riley (drums).


Thanks to Olof Bjrner for setlist info!
